rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" in a writing context unambiguously loads onto prose quality — sentence clarity, concision, word choice, paragraph cohesion. This is the primary and load-bearing obligation; failure to improve prose quality invalidates the delegation.
rationale.R1.2: Peripheral guard: polishing must not introduce logical inversions or break the causal chain of the argument (e.g., the CMDP counterintuitive-result paragraph). Maintaining, not auditing, logical coherence.
rationale.R1.5: Peripheral: minor intra-passage reordering (e.g., grouping the computational-cost sentence earlier or later) may naturally arise during cleanup, but full structural reorganization is not mandated.
